name: istra
description: Durable operational project memory for open-ended work in Codex.

interface.longDescription: Resolve the current checkout, maintain requirements, ordered work, blockers, runs and evidence, and save authoritative checkpoints through Istra's local MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Open the Istra project linked to this checkout and show its current requirements and work queue.
Record this verification run and link its evidence to the relevant acceptance criterion.
Reconcile blockers and stale evidence, then save an authoritative checkpoint.
